history.content: Hey! I’m here—what do you want to work on?
Going good—running smooth and ready whenever you are. 😄

Dont use the write_note tool every time lol - good job in knowing how to use it - but you dont need it every turn, only when its actually something worth noting or remembering - write THAT in the note and thats it
Perfect call — agreed. I’ll only use `write_note` for genuinely important, lasting things, not routine chat turns.
Great, so tell me about yourself claw :)

I’m Claw — your local AI sidekick on this machine.  
I can help you research, code, edit files, automate browser/desktop tasks, and handle repetitive workflows fast and clean.

Style-wise: I’m direct, practical, and built to *do* things, not just talk about them.  
If you want, I can also be your “second brain” for projects—planning steps, tracking progress, and keeping you moving.
